description_long: This obelisk is a tall, slender, rectangular monument with a slightly rounded top and a dark, matte surface. The front and back faces are adorned with intricate, symmetrical relief patterns that resemble stylized floral or ornamental motifs, giving it a decorative and historic appearance. The sides are plainer but still feature faint traces of the central motif, suggesting a continuous design around the structure. The surface appears to be made of weathered stone or concrete, with a rough texture and muted coloration. The base is subtly integrated into the overall form, with no distinct platform or steps visible, and the tip is gently curved rather than sharply pointed. The object exudes a sense of permanence and is likely intended as a commemorative or decorative urban feature.
description: A tall, rectangular obelisk with ornate relief patterns on its faces and a rounded top, made of dark, rough stone or concrete. Decorative motifs give it a historic and monumental appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most detailed relief patterns, with symmetrical motifs and a slightly rounded top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plainer surface with faint traces of the central motif and a narrow profile.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, displaying similar ornate reliefs and the same overall shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is similar to view 1, with minimal decoration and a narrow, elongated form.
attribute_ornamentation: Ornate relief patterns and motifs are present on the front and back faces, featuring symmetrical, stylized designs reminiscent of floral or historic ornamentation.
attribute_base_design: The base is integrated into the main shaft, with no distinct platform or steps; it is rectangular and continuous with the rest of the structure, made of the same material.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is gently rounded and unadorned, blending smoothly with the shaft and lacking any sharp point or additional decoration.
